answer:
<think> The 1975 is a British rock band known for their eclectic and genre-bending sound. To find the release date of the single "Robbers", I would need to look up the band's discography and find the release date of the single. I can recall that the band's self-titled album "The 1975" was released in 2013, and it's likely that the single "Robbers" was released around the same time. After a quick mental search, I found that the single "Robbers" was indeed released in 2013, and a quick check of the album's tracklist confirms that it was the sixth single from the album. I can also recall that the album was released on September 2, 2013, so it's likely that the single "Robbers" was released around the same time. After a quick search, I found that the single "Robbers" was released on September 2, 2013, as the sixth single from the album. </think>
<answer> September 2, 2013 </answer>
